emailVerification.subject: Verify your email - EasyBons
emailVerification.body: Thank you for registering with EasyBons! To complete the registration process and activate your account, you need to verify your email address. Click the button below:
emailVerification.linkValid: The link is valid for 24 hours. After this time, you will need to register again.
emailVerification.ignoreIfNotYou: If you did not register with EasyBons, please ignore this message.
emailVerification.footer: Thank you for joining EasyBons! If you have any questions, contact us:
